title: Pan Seared Spanish Trout Ensaimada
description: A cultured and comforting Spanish dish featuring rainbow trout, deglaze fond, and a plant based friendly ensaimada form, with a cheese pull effect.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the ensaimada dough to a large rectangle, about 1/4 inch thick.
Place the trout fillets in the center of the dough, leaving a 1 inch border around them.
Sprinkle the smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper over the trout fillets.
Drizzle the olive oil and lemon juice over the trout fillets.
Sprinkle the vegan mozzarella shreds over the top of the trout fillets.
Fold the ensaimada dough over the trout fillets, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the ensaimada on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, seam side down.
Bake the ensaimada in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the ensaimada from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
